action.reasoning: Observation: Iter1 full FT gave worst-region 0.0019/overall 0.022; iter2 frozen linear probe exploded to loss~96 with ~1.5% val acc (below random). Analysis: CLIPVisionModel.pooler_output has poor scale for classifier (no visual_projection); freezing prevents domain adaptation to satellite; high LR on mismatched features causes instability. Decision: Refactor model to CLIPModel.get_image_features() for proper 512-dim embeddings, use differential LR (1e-5 vision+proj, 1e-3 head), label smoothing=0.1, 10 epochs, keep aug+clip_grad. This stabilizes training and leverages CLIP better. Submit eval after to get baseline score+time.
